paper_focus.title: Work hardening in Fe–Al alloys
paper_focus.research_objective: To elucidate the origin of the sharp peak in work hardening rate in Fe–Al alloys around 28% Al by correlating dislocation structures with composition and ordering effects.
main_process_variables: thermal history: as-cast and annealed, coarse grain size, thermally relaxed
slow cooling to attain B2 order with moderate DO3 order
plastic strain range for work hardening measurement (e.g., 1–1.5%)
